name: Mrs Fields Soft and Chewy Peanut Butter Cooky
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F (150°C).
2. In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. In a large bowl, cream sugars with an electric mixer on medium speed until light and fluffy.
4. Add butter and mix to form a grainy paste, scraping the sides of the bowl.
5. Beat in eggs, peanut butter, and vanilla extract until well combined.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture to the sugar mixture, mixing at low speed until just combined. Do not overmix.
7. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet, about 1 1/2 inches apart.
8. Using a wet fork, gently press crisscross patterns on top of each cookie.
9. Bake for 18-22 minutes, or until the edges are slightly browned.
10. Transfer cookies immediately to a wire rack with a spatula to cool.
